hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · AI & Automation · Web & Cloud
hero.tagline: Architecting digital experiences that push the boundaries of the web.

about.label: 01 / About
about.bio: Full-Stack Developer with experience in scalable web and mobile applications. Specialized in AI integration and automation of processes. I've optimized platforms by 45% in performance and reduced API consumption by 35%.
about.bio2: With 4+ years across the full stack, I specialize in high-performance web apps, AI integrations, and immersive interactive experiences that feel as good as they look.
about.bio3: I thrive at the intersection of engineering precision and creative design — where code becomes art.

services.label: 03 / Services
services.s1desc: Scalable, high-performance full-stack applications built with modern frameworks and best practices.
services.s2desc: Embedding cutting-edge AI into your products — from chatbots to intelligent automation workflows.
services.s3desc: Immersive web experiences with 3D graphics, smooth animations, and storytelling-driven design.
services.s4desc: Cross-platform mobile applications that feel native on iOS and Android, published to the stores.
services.s5desc: Streamlined CI/CD pipelines, containerized deployments, and production-ready cloud infrastructure.

experience.label: 05 / Experience
experience.e1desc: Developed web and mobile applications with Django, PHP and Flutter for the education sector and SMBs. Implemented custom CMS and automated academic reporting with AI tools.
experience.e1a1: Implemented CMS that allowed non-technical users to self-manage content
experience.e1a2: Automated academic reports and documents, reducing administrative workload
experience.e1a3: Led technical deliveries in SCRUM ensuring sprint compliance
experience.e1a4: Implemented AI for automatic performance matrix generation
experience.e2desc: Reduced unnecessary API calls by 35% via backend optimization and caching. Built full-stack streaming system supporting ~600 concurrent users and immersive experiences for aviation sector.
experience.e2a1: Reduced API calls by 35% via backend optimization and caching
experience.e2a3: Implemented full-stack streaming supporting ~600 concurrent users
experience.e2a4: Developed voice-based interactive web experience for aviation sector
experience.e2a5: Built immersive experiences with Apple Vision SDK, SwiftUI and Objective-C
experience.e3desc: Optimized mobile performance reducing resource consumption by 25%. Automated internal processes reducing execution times from hours to minutes and published apps on iOS.
experience.e3a2: Automated internal processes reducing execution times from hours to minutes
experience.e3a3: Participated in cloud deployments with AWS and Docker
experience.e3a4: Published applications on iOS using Apple Developer SDK

experience.e4a2: Developed modules with React + Node.js integrated with MySQL
experience.e4a3: Integrated REST APIs and resolved production incidents
experience.e5desc: Reduced frontend visual errors by 60% and automated reports with Node.js. Published apps on App Store and Google Play. Integrated real-time communications with Twilio.
